headlines.headline: Plevyl Advisors names new head of wireless connectivity division

sentiment.reasoning: Appointing a new division head is a standard leadership change that typically has neutral immediate impact until strategy is clarified.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
